mapper.select:
select a.AREA_ID,a.AREA_CODE,a.AREA_TYPE,a.AREA_NAME,a.AREA_DESC ,a.AREA_PATH,a.PARENT_ID,a.IS_DATA_CONTROL,a.CREATE_ID ,a.CREATE_DATE,a.MODIFY_ID,a.MODIFY_DATE,a.EXPIRE_DATE from sm_area a
LEFT JOIN SM_REL_OP_AREA b on a.area_id = b.area_id
where a.AREA_TYPE < 4 AND a.EXPIRE_DATE IS NULL AND a.status='VALID'
AND b.EXPIRE_DATE IS NULL and b.OP_ID=#{opId}

select a.AREA_ID , a.AREA_CODE , a.AREA_TYPE , a.AREA_NAME , a.AREA_DESC , a.AREA_PATH , a.PARENT_ID , a.IS_DATA_CONTROL , a.CREATE_ID , a.CREATE_DATE , a.MODIFY_ID , a.MODIFY_DATE , a.EXPIRE_DATE from sm_area a where a.EXPIRE_DATE IS NULL AND a.status = 'VALID'

SELECT a.AREA_ID, a.AREA_CODE, a.AREA_TYPE, a.AREA_NAME, a.AREA_DESC, a.AREA_PATH, a.PARENT_ID, a.IS_DATA_CONTROL, a.CREATE_ID, a.CREATE_DATE, a.MODIFY_ID, op.OP_NAME AS createName, a.MODIFY_DATE, a.EXPIRE_DATE, a1.AREA_NAME AS parentName, a.STATUS FROM sm_area a INNER JOIN sm_area a1 ON a.PARENT_ID = a1.AREA_ID INNER JOIN sm_operator op ON a.CREATE_ID = op.OP_ID
LEFT JOIN SM_REL_OP_AREA b on a.area_id = b.area_id
where a.EXPIRE_DATE IS NULL
AND b.EXPIRE_DATE IS NULL and b.OP_ID=#{query.opId}
AND a.PARENT_ID =#{query.areaId}
AND a.AREA_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.areaCode},'%')
AND a.AREA_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.areaName},'%')
